SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
InvalidCodeException
needed an exception class for if the code does not consist of only .
LinkedConverterTreeInterface<T>
This is a generic LinkedConverterTreeInterface It is intended for creation of LinkedTrees that do conversion using a LinkedTree Note: usually addNode, fetchNode and LNROutputTraversal would be private
MorseCodeConverter
the spine of the project this file takes everything else and ties it all together it can take in a file that contains morse code, parses it into more easily processable Strings and then converts those strings to english
MorseCodeConverter_GFA_Test
 
MorseCodeConverterTestPublic
 
MorseCodeDriverFX
 
MorseCodeMain
 
MorseCodeTree
This is a MorseCodeTree which is specifically used for the conversion of morse code to english It relies on a root (reference to root of the tree) The root is set to null when the tree is empty.
MorseCodeTreeTestSelfMade
Test case file for all* of the (self made) methods used in the project *does not directly test all methods but the greater methods that use the mini methods
TreeNode<T>
Simple objects that represents a node in a tree
